description: DEPRECATED: Use contacts_get_summary instead for listing contacts. This tool is only needed for paginated browsing through large contact lists. For 'list my contacts' or 'show contacts' requests, ALWAYS use contacts_get_summary which returns the first 10 contacts efficiently. Only use this tool if the user specifically wants to browse more contacts beyond the first 10.

partnerClientCode.description: Optional partner client code to call APIs on behalf of a specific partner office/sub-client. Only use when explicitly requested by the user.

pageSize.description: Number of contacts per page (default: 10, recommended max: 50). Use smaller pages to avoid hallucination on large datasets.

pageNum.description: Page number to retrieve (default: 1). Use pagination to browse through large contact lists.

contacts.description: Array of simplified contact objects (name and phone only, not full contact details). This prevents hallucination by keeping response minimal.

totalCount.description: Total number of contacts available across all pages
